evals.name: add-waiver-entity
evals.prompt: Add a Waiver entity to the data model. Each gym has its own waiver text (e.g. liability release), and every member needs to have signed the current version before they can sign up for classes. Track who signed it, when, and what version of the waiver they signed (so we know who needs to re-sign when the gym updates the waiver text). Implement the full three-layer change: the Mongoose schema, the Express router with the right role guards, and the client TypeScript service. Also tell me anything I need to register or wire up elsewhere, and what would need to change in the signup flow to enforce 'must have signed current waiver' (you don't have to implement the signup change, just describe it).
evals.expected_output: Three new files (db/waiver.ts, server/waiver/waiverService.ts, service/WaiverService.ts), a description of how to register the router in src/server/index.ts, and a note on how signup would enforce the requirement. Schema follows fitfamconnect conventions: plain interface (not Document &), string IDs, optional-by-default, indexes, owner-scoped.
